column1: # CMS 2025 Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug (MA-PD) Star Ratings
# distribution by overall Star Rating tier.
# Source: CMS 2025 Part C and D Star Ratings
# Numbers are rounded to whole-contract counts from the published
# release. Total MA-PD contracts rated: roughly 412. The 4-or-higher
# tier holds approximately 40% of MA-PD enrollees in 2025
# Update annually after the October release. The accompanying
# scripts/build_cliff.py reads this file and writes the density
# curve into the cliff figure in index.html
#   count   - number of MA-PD contracts at that rating
